title: Agitation and bizarre behavior in a 28-year-old
presentation: A 28-year-old male is brought in by police after being found directing traffic naked at 3am. His family says he has not slept in 4 days, has been spending thousands of dollars online, and believes he has been chosen by God to lead a new nation. He has no prior psychiatric history. Vitals: BP 138/86, HR 104, Temp 37.1C, SpO2 99%. He is grandiose, pressured speech, easily distracted, denies any substance use.

gold_standard_workup.key_decision_point: First episode psychosis/mania requires full medical workup to rule out organic cause before attributing to primary psychiatric illness. Thyroid and substances are key.
